user.title: Configure Bagwatch
user.description: Set up the market data provider. You will add positions after the integration is created.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Bagwatch
reconfigure.description: Update provider settings for this portfolio.

error.invalid_position: The position data is invalid or incomplete.

init.title: Add position
init.description: Add one portfolio position with purchase data and optional provider hints.

data.name: Display name
data.cost_basis_base: Exact cost basis in portfolio currency

data_description.symbol: User-facing symbol, for example MSFT.US or BTC.
data_description.name: Optional friendly name used in Home Assistant.
data_description.asset_type: Choose the asset class for provider mapping.
data_description.average_buy_price: Average unit buy price. Use with purchase currency.
data_description.buy_currency: Currency for average buy price, for example USD or PLN.
data_description.cost_basis: Optional total purchase cost for the whole position.
data_description.cost_basis_base: Optional exact total cost already converted to the portfolio base currency.
data_description.fees_total: Optional total fees to add to the position cost basis.
data_description.provider_symbol: Optional exact provider ticker when the user symbol is not enough.
data_description.exchange: Optional exchange hint for ambiguous symbols.
data_description.country: Optional country hint for ambiguous symbols.

init.title: Bagwatch options
init.description: Update provider settings. Positions are managed separately from the integration page.
